questions.q: Released on May 2, 2026, the 5.0.0 update of NetHack replaced its 'makedefs' utility with text alternatives loaded in which programming language?
In early May 2026, Take-Two's CEO Strauss Zelnick stated that GTA 6 won't feature real-world brand partnerships for what primary reason?
options: Because all the brands are made up
The licensing costs are too high
questions.correctText: Because all the brands are made up

questions.q: According to the May 2026 Patch 1.05.00 for Crimson Desert, players can now pick up previously decorative gold bars scattered in the world to yield what item?
options: A Crude Gold Bar worth 5 Silver
questions.correctText: A Crude Gold Bar worth 5 Silver

questions.q: In a May 2026 interview, Naoki Hamaguchi, the director of the Final Fantasy VII Remake trilogy, revealed that he has already completed how many full playthroughs of the unreleased third game?
The May 2026 announcement trailer for the puzzle adventure game 'Beware of the Cartographer!' tasks players with mapping a mysterious land during which historical period?
